Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class AccountCleanInfo

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.AccountCleanInfo
public class AccountCleanInfo extends SObject

Java class for AccountCleanInfo complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="AccountCleanInfo">
